mono_data.usage: Used for all mix results, numbers, tabular data, and carbon metrics.

layout_spacing.padding: p-6 or p-8 for containers, tight padding for table cells
layout_spacing.surface_strategy: Grid Borders (The 'Technical' Look). Expose the skeleton. border-collapse style layout. Items have border-r border-b border-border/40. No soft shadows. Hard 1px borders to ground UI.

components.forms: Use Shadcn Input, Select, Form, Checkbox. Heavily customized with stark 1px borders, square corners (rounded-none or max rounded-sm).
components.tables: Dense, highly structured, JetBrains Mono for data cells.
components.buttons: Flat, pure primary color (#FF5E00) or pure black for secondary. Hover state: slightly darker, MUST ensure text contrast. No shadows.
components.cards: Go cardless or use flat rectangular shapes with a single 1px border. No soft drop shadows.
components.charts: Shadcn Recharts for 7-day, 28-day, 56-day compressive strength predictions and Carbon Emissions.

animations.micro_interactions: Hover states must have higher contrast. Lighter hue of active state. Focus states must have sharp ring-2 ring-primary ring-offset-1.

icons.usage: Dense dashboards, engineering tools, clear precision lines. Weight: regular or bold depending on emphasis.

testing.requirements: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute. Kebab-case, role-based (e.g., data-testid='predict-strength-button').

image_urls.description: Silhouette of cranes and a building under construction against a vivid sunset sky. Use with a dark or semi-transparent overlay to ensure auth card readability.
Silhouette of workers on a construction site against a vibrant sunset sky. Ideal for a marketing hero section if applicable.

media.overlays: Max overlay opacity: bg-black/50 for hero/auth images. Preferred range bg-black/40. Or gradient overlay.

instructions_to_main_agent: Install fonts: Cabinet Grotesk, IBM Plex Sans, JetBrains Mono.
Do not use generic 'Inter' for Headings. Use Cabinet Grotesk.
Configure Tailwind with the provided color system (Archetype 4: Swiss & High-Contrast). Base: Stark White, Text: Black, Accent: Safety Orange.
Build the dashboard using a cardless, Grid Borders approach. Emphasize 1px solid borders for separation.
For the mix optimization, predict strength form, and results, use dense, data-heavy layouts with JetBrains Mono for all numeric values.
Ensure all buttons, inputs, tabs have data-testid attributes.
Implement Shadcn charts for visualizing compressive strength over time (7, 28, 56 days) and carbon emission comparisons.
Follow 'Control Room Grid' rules for the main application area: fill all vertical space, no jagged bottoms.
Avoid glassmorphism. Use flat solid surfaces to maintain data readability.
